title: syngramma campyloneuroides
intro: Syngramma campyloneuroides, also known as the Shuttleworth's Syngramma, is a species of fern found in tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Syngramma campyloneuroides include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve symptoms of allergic reactions. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures.
